event.title: Clinic days - Brian
event.location: Willow Creek Midwifery, 240 Merrimon Avenue, Asheville, NC
event.notes: Leave house by 8:30 AM. On-call bag stocked. Neil handles Owen drop-off and Hazel pickup 3:15 PM.

event.title: Owen preschool
event.location: Little Acorn Preschool, 88 Montford Avenue, Asheville, NC
event.notes: Neil drops off at 8:50 AM. Pick up by 12:15 PM on non-clinic days. Tuition due 1st of month: $520.

event.title: Hazel school day
event.location: Ira B. Jones Elementary, Asheville, NC
event.notes: After-school program until 3:15 PM pickup Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri. Wednesday art class until 4:10 PM.

event.title: Saturday farmers market
event.location: West Asheville Tailgate Market, Haywood Road, Asheville, NC
event.notes: Arrive 7:45 AM to set up Mountain Morning Teas booth. Family sometimes joins. Leave house by 7:30.

event.title: Neil staff meeting / prep period
event.notes: Neil's planning period. Available by phone if urgent family matter arises.

event.title: Budget review
event.notes: Review household budget together. Confirm $600 savings transfer. Check mortgage auto-pay. Review Mountain Morning Teas QuickBooks summary.

event.title: CEU progress check
event.notes: Check CEU hours logged against December 2026 deadline. Currently 8 of 20 hours completed as of February 2026.

event.title: Willow Creek Annual Team Retreat
event.location: Pisgah View Ranch Retreat Cabins, Blue Ridge Cabin, Candler, NC 28715
event.attendees: Brian Santos, Dani Cho, Helen Marsh, Rosa Ibarra, Priya Shah, Keisha Fuller
event.notes: Overnight retreat. On-call coverage arranged with Lenoir Memorial Midwifery. Brian driving - depart Haywood Road 9:30 AM Saturday. Neil covering all kid logistics both days.

event.title: Santos Family Cookout in Roanoke
event.location: Loretta and Ray Sims home, Roanoke, VA
event.attendees: Brian Santos, Neil Santos, Hazel Santos, Owen Santos
event.notes: Drive up Saturday, return Sunday. Full family trip. Kids visit grandparents. Plan drive time approximately 3 hours.

event.title: Owen's 4th Birthday Party
event.notes: Bouncy castle rental confirmed. Neighborhood kids invited. Keep guest list small. Owen will be 4. No clowns - Owen is scared of clowns.

event.title: CEU Webinar - Evidence-Based Approaches to Postpartum Hemorrhage
event.notes: Pre-test due by November 28, 2026. Confirmation number: ACNM-CEU-2026-PPH-04419. Will bring total CEU hours to 11 of 20. Neil covers morning routine.

event.title: Christmas - Loretta and Ray visiting
event.attendees: Brian Santos, Neil Santos, Hazel Santos, Owen Santos, Loretta Sims, Ray Sims
event.notes: Loretta and Ray driving from Roanoke. Staying two nights. Pull-out couch in the living room. Buy bourbon for Ray.

event.title: Hazel's 7th Birthday - Horse Party
event.notes: Horse-themed party. Hazel requested horse cake. Look into pony encounter or visit to riding stable. Party at house. Invite school friends from Ira B. Jones.

event.title: Loretta visiting for on-call coverage weekend
event.notes: Loretta driving from Roanoke to cover kids during heavy on-call stretch. Coordinate bed, grocery stock, kid drop-off timing before she arrives.

event.title: Carolinas Birth Network Spring CEU Gathering
event.notes: Day trip with Dani. Drive together. Estimated 6 CEU hours. Neil has the kids all day. Register by January 2027.

birthday.notes: Best friend. Text or call. Usually meet up for dinner nearby.
First grader. Horse-obsessed. January 2027 party planned.
Brian's mother. Call in the morning. She prefers phone to text.
Colleague and coverage partner. Coffee or lunch together if schedules align.
Husband. Plan something special. He does not ask for much.
Turning 4. Party at home planned. Bouncy castle booked.
Brian's father. Call him. He will not bring it up himself.
Own birthday. December always busy - do not let it get lost.
OB-GYN collaborator. Note card or brief acknowledgment appropriate.
